## Summary

What does this PR do? Link any related issues (e.g. `Closes #123`).

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI / tooling change

## Which packages are affected?

- [ ] `packages/cli`
- [ ] `packages/web`

## How to test

Steps to verify the change works:

1. `cd packages/cli && npm install && node bin/dawood.js`
2. ...

## Screenshots / recordings

If this is a UI change, add before/after screenshots.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code is clean and follows the existing style
- [ ] No debug `console.log` left in production code
- [ ] README updated if new features or commands were added
- [ ] Tested on Node.js 18+ (the minimum required version)
